name: Colonie Golf & Country Club
about: Colonie Golf & Country Club is a private golf and country club located in Voorheesville, NY, offering a range of amenities including an 18-hole championship course designed by Geoffrey Cornish, five Har-Tru tennis courts, two pools, and an indoor golf facility with simulators. The club features a dining establishment, the 19th Hole Bar & Grill, which provides a casual atmosphere and is welcoming to golfers, families, and couples. Membership is required for full access to all facilities and events.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art indoor golf facility with two Uneekor Golf Simulators
Year-round access to over 120 iconic golf courses around the world
Opportunities for professional lessons and league play
Kid-friendly environment with specialized programs like Camp Colonie and Birdie Bandits Jr. PGA League

food_and_drink.notes: The 19th Hole Bar & Grill offers creative handheld sandwiches, gourmet burgers, steaks, salads, and select chef specialties.
Outdoor patio with a firepit available for socializing and relaxation.

simulator_hardware.notes: Two simulators available for tee times 7 days a week

faq.question: Do I need clubs to use the golf simulators?
faq.answer: Yes, clubs are required to use the golf simulators. The facility encourages players to bring their own equipment for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The 19th Hole Bar & Grill offers food and drinks on-site. Outside food and drinks may not be permitted; it's best to check with the club for their specific policy.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes on the simulator can vary, but typically it takes about 2-3 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Colonie Golf & Country Club is kid-friendly and offers programs like Camp Colonie, Flying Fish Swim Team, Birdie Bandits Jr. PGA League, and Kid's Night Out.
